legacyNote: Synthetic N-1 fixture for the thresholds/styleOnly back-compat test (RubricThresholdsBackcompatTests). NOT a real rubric. Represents a PRE-thresholds-relocation (v1.1.0) asset: it carries assessability + notAssessedReason + bands + criticalFailIds, but DELIBERATELY OMITS every criterion's 'thresholds' and 'styleOnly' fields. The loader must map RubricCriterion.Thresholds == null (N-1 tolerance) and StyleOnly == false (fail-closed) and must NOT throw, mirroring the missing-'assessability' and missing-'notAssessedReason' tolerances. One criterion of each profile (Båda, EndastAts, EndastVisuell) is present.
